MyPresentation.description: Student in 3rd year of technical school focused on programming. I code front-end and back-end for web apps.

Timelines.nasa_2025_desc1: Building an app about exoplanets where users could learn facts about them

ProjectEntries.anticheat_description: I got inspired from YouTuber @PrimerBlobs. This program uses probability to determine whether a blob is cheating. This program was created in TypeScript using OOP.
ProjectEntries.calculator_description: An advanced investment calculator that allows you to create deposit and withdrawal scenarios, compare investment scenarios and export your scenarios.
ProjectEntries.hsw_title: Stalowy Szlak - Promotional game for HSW
ProjectEntries.hsw_description: A game about the local arming industry created during a hackathon at ZST Leżajsk
ProjectEntries.backend_description: Backend written in DrizzleORM, Typescript, Express, JWT.

AboutMe.title: About me
AboutMe.description:
Hi! I'm Jan, a student in the 3rd year of a technical school focused on programming, with a passion for designing and creating modern web applications. Besides that, I also create electronics based on microcontrollers and microcomputers.
I develop software using the latest technology available on the market. The main technologies I use are TypeScript, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Express.js, and Drizzle ORM. I regularly work with Arch Linux.

CV.description: Below, you can see my current Curriculum Vitae. You can download it in PDF format or print it.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.cta: Do you have a project to realize, or do you just want to talk about technologies and code? Write to me! I’m always open to new challenges and interesting collaborations.
